things.name: Burj Khalifa
things.description: World's tallest building at 828m with observation decks on floors 124 and 148

things.name: Dubai Mall
things.description: World's largest shopping centre with an aquarium, ice rink and the Dubai Fountain

things.name: Palm Jumeirah
things.description: Iconic palm-shaped artificial island with luxury hotels and Atlantis resort

things.name: Dubai Creek & Gold Souk
things.description: Historic waterway with abra water taxis, gold and spice souks

things.name: Museum of the Future
things.description: Stunning torus-shaped building showcasing technology and innovations of tomorrow

things.name: Desert Safari
things.description: Dune bashing, camel riding and Bedouin camp dinner in the Arabian desert

things.name: Jumeirah Beach
things.description: Iconic public beach with views of the Burj Al Arab and outdoor fitness culture

things.name: Dubai Frame
things.description: 150m picture frame-shaped landmark bridging old and new Dubai with a glass floor bridge

things.name: Dubai Museum
things.description: Dubai's oldest building - Al Fahidi Fort - with exhibits on traditional Emirati life

things.name: Al Seef Heritage District
things.description: Recreated traditional creek-side heritage district with dhow rides and local food
